🚀 Big Launches.title: Google Finance upgrades
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google Finance has been upgraded with a new app and various improvements.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI has been asked by the Trump administration to delay the release of its new model, GPT-5.6, due to safety concerns.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Adobe acquires Topaz Labs
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Adobe has acquired Topaz Labs, a company that specializes in image and video enhancement tools.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Hugging Face has released a new feature that allows users to run a vLLM server on HF jobs in one command.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that can replicate conventional AI systems.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Detecting and Controlling Sycophancy with Cascading Linear Features
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers have proposed a method to detect and control sycophancy in AI models using cascading linear features.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Life After Benchmark Saturation: A Case Study of CORE-Bench
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers have studied the limitations of benchmark saturation and proposed a new approach to evaluating AI models.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Refusal Lives Downstream of Persona in Chat Models
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers have discovered that refusal and persona traits in chat models interact with each other.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: AlgoEvolve: LLM-driven Meta-evolution of Algorithmic Trading Programs
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers have proposed a method to use LLMs to evolve algorithmic trading programs.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Agentic Analysis for Agentic Infrastructure: An LLM-Powered Pipeline for Comparative Governance of DAO and Corporate AI Protocols
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers have proposed a pipeline to analyze and compare the governance structures of AI protocols.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The White House has asked OpenAI to delay the release of its new model due to safety concerns.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Ford had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Ford has had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Patronus AI has raised $50M to build digital worlds that can stress-test AI agents.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: General Intuition has raised $2.3B to train AI agents using video games.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Amazon has invested $13B in AI infrastructure in India.

tool_of_day.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tool_of_day.summary: Hugging Face has released a new feature that allows users to run a vLLM server on HF jobs in one command.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and transparent practices, with a focus on safety, governance, and explainability, as seen in the recent delays and investments in AI infrastructure.
